title: helianthemum marifolium subsp. dichroum
intro: Helianthemum marifolium subsp. dichroum, also known as Rock Rose, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Cistaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Rock Rose include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to improve sleep quality. Rock Rose can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular choice for natural remedies.
